title: Delhi High Court orders restoration of 4PM news' YouTube channel but several videos to remain blocked
description: The Delhi High Court has ordered the restoration of digital news platform 4PM’s YouTube channel but said that its videos -- which the government says are detrimental to India’s national security and public order -- will remain temporarily blocked.  Justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav said that the office bearers of 4PM will appear before the Inter-Departmental Committee (IDC) constituted under the Intermediary Rules, which will point out the offending material on their channel. If t
